description: Celebrate your graduate in a meaningful, personalized way with a hand-painted graduation photo board. It is perfect for graduation parties, senior nights, and open houses!  Each board is painted by hand on a sturdy trifold display measuring 36 x 48 inches when fully unfolded, giving you plenty of space to showcase photos and memories. STANDARD DESIGN Includes the graduate's name and graduation year, along with up to two sports or activities represented in the hand-painted design.  DELUXE DESIGN Includes everything in the Standard option, plus more details! This can include a favorite quote or Bible verse, extra sports, activities, or hobbies, and more decorative elements to create a fuller, more detailed display. This option is ideal if your graduate has many interests or you'd like a more
